struct@(A,B) Pair {
  x: Int@A;
  y: Int@B;
}

func@(A,B) main() {
  let pairs = Pair@(A,B) { x: 10, y: 20 };
  if true@A {
    pairs = Pair@(A,_) { x: 10 };
  }
}
---
E1 9:5: value `pairs` contains role `B` that is not in scope
E24 9:13: cannot assign type `struct@(A,_) Pair` to `struct@(A,B) Pair`
